story.title: The Love Story
story.quote: Love is a beautiful journey, made extraordinary when we walk beside one another.
story.body: With joyful hearts, we invite you to witness and celebrate the beginning of our married life.

dress.title: Dress Code
dress.subtitle: Shades of Love, Shades of Pink
dress.note: Rose, blush, champagne, and soft cream tones are warmly welcomed.
